docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GULVARRA, ROMEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GULVARRA, ROMEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GULVARRA, ROMEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PARK HOTEL, 1040 FOLSOM ST. #19, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY, PER CCP (585 (D). FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR SERVED MAR-23-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GULVARRA, ROMEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GULVARRA, ROMEL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT GULVARRA, ROMEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.42 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR
